query:
UPDATE invoices i
SET 
  subtotal_net = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total_net), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 0),
  tax_amount = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_tax), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 0),
  total_gross = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total_net) + SUM(line_tax), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 0),
  updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 1) > 0;
